Adept of the Red Sisterhood.entries.1.it: You gain a Claw attack that deals {@dice 1d6} plus your Strength or Dexterity modifier Slashing Damage. You are proficient with this attack, and you add either your Strength or Dexterity modifier to attack and damage rolls. This attack is not an {@variantrule Unarmed Strike|XPHB}, nor can it be used in place of an {@variantrule Unarmed Strike|XPHB}.
Adept of the Sea Sisterhood.entries.1.it: You gain a Claw attack that deals {@dice 1d6} plus your Strength or Dexterity modifier Slashing Damage. You are proficient with this attack, and you add either your Strength or Dexterity modifier to attack and damage rolls. This attack is not an {@variantrule Unarmed Strike|XPHB}, nor can it be used in place of an {@variantrule Unarmed Strike|XPHB}.

Mimic Object.entries.0: When you manifest your Ooze Form, it lasts until you finish a {@variantrule Short Rest|XPHB|Short} or {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.
Natural Armor.entries.2.entries.0: You can gain this Mutation more than once, but no more than three times.
Preeminent in House.entries.0: When you request a favor from your house (as decribed under "{@optfeature Favored in House|EFA}"), it can take one of the following additional forms:
Ranger.entries.1: Once you cast the spell using this talent, you can't do so again until you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.
Recognized in House.entries.0: When you request a favor from your house (as decribed under "{@optfeature Favored in House|EFA}"), it can take one of the following additional forms:
Repelling Blast.entries.1.entries.0.entr: You can gain this invocation more than once. Each time you do so, choose a different eligible cantrip.
Seasonally Affected.entries.2.name: Spring
Seasonally Affected.entries.3.name: Summer
Seasonally Affected.entries.4.name: Autumn
Seasonally Affected.entries.5.name: Winter
Shadow Arrow.entries.1: The psychic damage increases to {@damage 4d6} when you reach 18th level in this class.
Soman Bloodline.entries.1.items.3: You gain a {@variantrule Climb Speed|XPHB} equal to your {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}.
Steelskin Ointment.entries.0: For 1 minute, you have {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage.
Supreme Sanguine Curse.entries.6: Non-evil creatures that witness your true form become instantly {@variantrule Hostile [Attitude]|XPHB|Hostile} to you, unless the GM decides otherwise.
Tomb of Levistus.entries.1: Once you use this invocation, you can't use it again until you finish a short or long rest.
